title: Depths Below
description: Adds a new psychological horror entity to the dark depths of the underground. Inspired by the legend of White Eyes and Mojang's discarded Shade monster.
body:
**Depths Below** introduces a terrifying new presence to the dark caves of Minecraft. As you venture deeper underground, an unseen force may begin to stalk you, testing your sanity and survival skills. This datapack adds a chilling layer of psychological horror, where the safety of light and sound is never guaranteed. Will you be able to escape the lurking terror, or will the depths claim you?

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/i4fGCvwdSMk" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


**HELP!**
Why does the entity look like a water bottle? - Make sure you download the resource pack that comes with the appropriate version.

**WARNING**
You are playing a beta version of the pack, so you may also come across bugs. If you have issues with the pack please report them in the discord.
The 0.1 version of the datapack may be incompatible with Iris and Optifine shaders and with mods that change the height of the sea level.

A wiki to all the features of this datapack is found in the link of the discord.
[Discord invite link](https://discord.gg/gSDsfcpnbC)

![Stalked](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99d310f6c28e6afd4741dc31a9116dc7b6ffafaf_0.webp)
